name: Senolytics bone RCT extraction-refresh revision-state repair
summary: Marks the D+Q bone RCT extraction-refresh candidate as needs_revision and records that its extraction-fidelity and safety-limitations findings remain open until publication-table, supplement/subgroup, and event-specific adverse-event extraction repairs are completed.

scope.question: Repair the lifecycle and audit state for the D+Q bone RCT extraction-refresh candidate after linked review lanes returned needs_revision findings.

proposed_records.rationale: Tracks this bounded self-healing repair candidate and its required review lanes.
Aligns the target candidate lifecycle and summary with linked needs_revision review findings without promoting or mutating underlying evidence records.
